spec: The splash is the full editable Holo Splash theme studio (theme picker · plymouth client dock · import) when opened standalone in the holospace, AND a clean firmware-style boot splash (chromeless, F2 → rEFInd boot menu) on the boot path — both served from a dumb static host with every byte κ-verified (Law L5), 100% serverless

results.name: gateway is a static splash — it does NOT auto-boot; it waits for the user
explicit boot: pressing Enter on the gateway boots into the splash handoff
boot face: the gateway boots → a clean handoff splash (chromeless, F2 prompt, κ SW controls, isolated)
F2 → Holo Boot (rEFInd): the boot menu renders its entries, κ SW controls — every boot byte re-derived (L5)
studio face: the standalone splash is the editable theme studio (κ-verified theme picker · Import · controls)
studio face: every active theme byte re-derives to its κ — the live L5 badge reads verified
controls: a 3-mode Background segmented control (Dark · Light · Immersive) with one active
controls: a Center-size slider with a live % readout
redundant components removed: the busy plymouth dev-dock + the old BG dropdown are gone
loading bar: a precise progress bar under the centre animation (default Boot time 12 s) fills over the run
Boot time editable: setting a new time restarts the bar at that duration (run resets toward 0)
Background toggle wired (static mark): Dark = clean (field hidden) · Immersive = field shown
animated theme 'Hologram Pulse' (Pack 5): solo (no field), running, with the dot-mark sprites
single loading bar: a theme's own bar is suppressed (no double) — only the canonical DOM bar shows
Center-size slider scales the centre animation (--center-scale follows the slider)
imported image-theme · Immersive shows the theme's OWN backdrop (kept), the wave field OFF (no blur)
imported image-theme · Light removes the backdrop behind the centre animation (logo kept, no field)
no κ mismatch (409) anywhere across boot · F2 menu · studio — the whole splash is content-native (L5)
